text: Hello. Yes? Good afternoon, this is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? I think it's a wrong number, this is more of a motel business.
